name: space_rogue_bench
description: Bench-mode variant of space_rogue: provisions from the Biplane describe fixture, then runs free-model agents against the planned tasks with --max-turns. Uses per-agent max_turns (engine gets more turns for the complex turn-loop + RNG work; combat gets fewer). AssertFileExists/AssertFileContains verify the planned work was actually produced -- the floor that makes this a real benchmark, not just a no-deadlock check.

steps.explanation: Provision from space_rogue.describe.json: engine, worldgen, combat (max_agents=3 caps ui out).
Run the squire until the swarm is quiescent -- agents produce their planned work across bounded --max-turns slices, persisting and resuming each tick until all tasks are done.
The Biplane-planned swarm must not produce a wait-cycle.
